cards.title: Zuckerberg: AI Progress Slower Than Expected
cards.body: Meta's CEO told staff that AI development efforts aren't advancing as quickly as anticipated. The comments reflect broader challenges in the AI industry's progress timeline.

cards.title: Meta Launches Pocket AI Gaming App
cards.body: Meta quietly released Pocket, an experimental app enabling users to generate and share interactive mini-games via text prompts. The launch represents Meta's continued push into AI-driven creative tools.

cards.title: Anthropic Discusses Custom Chip with Samsung
cards.body: Anthropic is in talks with Samsung to develop a custom AI chip. The move follows OpenAI's announcement of its own custom chip partnership with Broadcom.

cards.title: OpenAI Proposes 5% Equity to Sovereign Fund
cards.body: Sam Altman has proposed donating 5% of OpenAI's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund. The proposal aims to let the public share in AI boom financial gains.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Deployment Group
cards.body: Microsoft committed $2.5 billion to a new AI deployment division. The move positions Microsoft alongside Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic in infrastructure development.

cards.title: Indian Entrepreneur Builds Office AI Alternative
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia is investing $30M of his own capital into Neo, an AI platform competing with Microsoft Office and Google Apps. Neo is his fifth venture focused on enterprise software.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows AI Device Prototype to Investors
cards.body: SpaceX demonstrated a handset-like AI device prototype before going public. The device signals SpaceX's potential expansion into wireless infrastructure.

cards.title: Ashton Kutcher Launches Infrastructure-Focused VC Firm
cards.body: Kutcher is leaving Sound Ventures to start a new fund with Morgan Beller focused on AI infrastructure and energy. The new fund targets the foundational layer powering AI companies.

cards.title: Cloudflare Pushes AI Companies to Pay Publishers
cards.body: Cloudflare requires AI companies to separate search and training crawlers by September 15 or face blocking on publisher sites. The policy aims to protect content creators from unpaid AI use.

cards.title: Venice AI Reaches Unicorn Status at $65M Series A
cards.body: Venice AI achieved unicorn valuation with $65M Series A funding while maintaining profitability. The privacy-first platform generates over $70M annualized revenue.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Now Available on Mac
cards.body: Google launched Gemini Spark, its 24/7 agentic assistant, on Mac with new features. The update includes real-time tracking and expanded app support.

cards.title: Meta Develops Cloud Infrastructure for AI Compute
cards.body: Meta is building a cloud infrastructure business to monetize excess AI compute capacity and models. The venture will compete directly with AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure.

cards.title: Trump Lifts Restrictions on Anthropic AI Models
cards.body: The Trump administration removed restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models. The policy shift reflects the administration's unpredictable approach to AI regulation.

cards.title: Wayve Launches $85M Employee Tender Offer
cards.body: Wayve announced an $85M employee tender offer valuing the company at $8.5B. The move reflects a growing trend of AI startups using tenders for talent retention.

cards.title: OpenClaw Released for Android and iOS
cards.body: OpenClaw, the free open-source agentic program, is now available on mobile platforms. The release expands access to the AI tool for smartphone users.

cards.title: Ex-DeepMind Researchers Build $500M Quant AI Lab
cards.body: EquiLibre Technologies, founded by three former DeepMind researchers, is now valued over $500M. The Prague-based lab applies AI expertise to quantitative hedge fund strategies.

cards.title: Mark Zuckerberg: AI Agents Slower Than Expected
cards.body: Meta's CEO told staff that AI development efforts are not progressing as quickly as anticipated. The remarks suggest internal concerns about the pace of AI advancement at the company.

cards.title: Meta Launches Pocket: AI-Powered Gaming App
cards.body: Meta quietly released Pocket, an experimental AI app enabling users to generate interactive mini-games using text prompts. The tool showcases Meta's push into generative AI applications.

cards.title: Anthropic Discusses Custom AI Chip With Samsung
cards.body: Anthropic is in talks with Samsung about developing a custom AI chip, following OpenAI's announcement of its own chip partnership with Broadcom. The move reflects the AI industry's push toward specialized hardware.

cards.title: OpenAI Proposes 5% Equity to US Sovereign Fund
cards.body: CEO Sam Altman has proposed donating 5% of OpenAI's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, allowing the public to share in AI boom gains. The move revives discussions about public ownership in major AI companies.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Deployment Company
cards.body: Microsoft committed $2.5 billion to a new AI deployment group, joining Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic in building infrastructure for AI services. The move signals major cloud providers' investment in enterprise AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Indian Tech Tycoon Bets $30M on AI Office Alternative
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia is investing $30 million of his own money to build Neo, an AI-powered alternative to Microsoft Office and Google Apps. The venture targets enterprise software with AI-first capabilities.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows AI Device Prototype to Investors
cards.body: SpaceX demonstrated a handset-like AI device to investors before going public, signaling interest in expanding into wireless. The device prototype suggests SpaceX may diversify beyond aerospace.

cards.title: Ashton Kutcher Launches VC Firm for AI Infrastructure
cards.body: Kutcher and Morgan Beller are launching a new venture fund focusing on AI infrastructure and energy, moving away from Sound Ventures' AI lab focus. The shift reflects growing investor interest in the foundational layer powering AI.

cards.title: Cloudflare Pushes AI Companies to Pay for Content
cards.body: Cloudflare gave AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers for search from those for AI training, or face being blocked on publisher sites. The policy aims to protect publisher content from unauthorized AI training.

cards.title: Venice AI Reaches Unicorn Status With $65M Series A
cards.body: Privacy-focused AI platform Venice AI secured $65 million in Series A funding and is already profitable with $70M+ annualized revenue. The achievement highlights growing demand for privacy-first AI solutions.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Now Available on Mac
cards.body: Google's agentic assistant Gemini Spark launched on Mac with real-time tracking and expanded app support. The 24/7 assistant reflects Google's push toward AI agents for everyday productivity.

cards.title: Meta Develops Cloud Business to Sell AI Compute
cards.body: Meta is building plans to sell access to AI compute power and models, competing against AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure. The move could turn Meta's excess AI infrastructure into a significant revenue stream.

cards.title: Trump Lifts Restrictions on Anthropic AI Models
cards.body: The Trump administration dropped restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models, reflecting its erratic AI policy approach. The decision leaves companies uncertain about future model release regulations.

cards.title: Wayve Launches $85M Employee Tender at $8.5B Valuation
cards.body: Autonomous vehicle AI company Wayve offered employees a $85 million tender at $8.5B valuation. The trend of employee tenders among AI startups reflects competitive talent retention strategies.

cards.title: OpenClaw Agent Now Available on Mobile
cards.body: OpenClaw, the free open-source agentic program, launched on Android and iOS. The mobile availability extends access to AI agents for smartphone users.

cards.title: Ex-DeepMind Trio Build $500M Quant AI Lab
cards.body: EquiLibre Technologies, founded by three former DeepMind researchers, is now valued over $500 million. The Prague-based AI lab built poker AI that now powers quantitative hedge fund strategies.

cards.title: Teaching AI to Optimize Wind Turbine Operations
cards.body: AI is increasingly deployed in physical infrastructure management beyond consumer chatbots, including wind turbine optimization. Industrial AI applications prioritize operational continuity and safety.

cards.title: Startup Tackles LLM Groupthink Problem With Diversity
cards.body: A new startup is addressing large language models' tendency toward groupthink by improving response diversity. The solution aims to break LLMs out of predictable answer patterns.

cards.title: Claude Science: Anthropic's Research-Focused AI
cards.body: Anthropic launched Claude Science, a flagship product designed to support scientific research alongside Claude Code for software engineering. The tool autonomously assists pharmaceutical and biotech researchers.

cards.title: Agriculture Industry Needs Better Data for AI
cards.body: AI is transforming agriculture, but industry leaders must establish data infrastructure before investing in AI solutions. The sector faces challenges with volatile costs and unpredictable weather.

cards.title: Google's AI Buildout Increased Electricity Use 37%
cards.body: Google's electricity consumption surged 37% in 2025 due to AI infrastructure expansion and data center buildout. The dramatic increase highlights the significant energy demands of large-scale AI operations.
